moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Underway
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is well underway in Canada, Mexico, and the USA, with group stage matches currently dominating the football schedule.

angles.name: Tournament Excitement
angles.copy: Who are you backing? The FIFA World Cup 2026 is live and the group stages are heating up in North America!

angles.name: Match Updates
angles.copy: Early results and big upsets are already happening! Keep up with all the FIFA World Cup 2026 action as it unfolds.

angles.name: Fan Engagement
angles.copy: Get your flags out! The biggest football tournament on the planet is live and happening right now. Who's your pick for the final?

moments.title: Glastonbury Festival 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The world-renowned Glastonbury Festival returns to Worthy Farm, Pilton, from Wednesday, June 24th to Sunday, June 28th, featuring a stellar lineup of artists.

angles.name: Countdown Excitement
angles.copy: Glastonbury countdown is ON! Worthy Farm is getting ready for the biggest party of the year, kicking off this Wednesday.

angles.name: Festival Prep
angles.copy: Who's already packed their wellies? Glastonbury Festival officially opens its gates this week. What's your must-see act?

angles.name: Music Anticipation
angles.copy: The gates to Glastonbury open soon! Get ready for five days of incredible music and legendary moments from rock to pop.

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Start
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships, the only Grand Slam played on grass, begins on Monday, June 29th at the All England Club.

angles.name: Tennis Kick-off
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first matches next Monday.

angles.name: Player Predictions
angles.copy: The biggest names in tennis are heading to SW19. Who's your pick for the Wimbledon title this year?

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for two weeks of world-class tennis as the Wimbledon Championships begin. Will we see any upsets?

moments.title: Summer Solstice - Longest Day
moments.blurb: Sunday, June 21st marks the Summer Solstice in the Northern Hemisphere, bringing the longest day and shortest night of 2026 to the UK.

angles.name: Enjoy Daylight
angles.copy: Enjoy every minute! Tomorrow is the Summer Solstice, meaning the longest day of the year here in the UK.

angles.name: Astronomical Summer
angles.copy: More daylight for longer! The Summer Solstice arrives tomorrow, officially marking the start of astronomical summer.

angles.name: Make the Most
angles.copy: Make the most of the sunshine! Tomorrow's the longest day of the year. How are you spending your extra daylight?

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday Lionel Richie
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long', turns 77 today.

angles.name: Celebrating a Legend
angles.copy: All Night Long we'll be celebrating! Happy 77th Birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie today.

angles.name: Favourite Track
angles.copy: Hello! It's Lionel Richie's birthday! The music icon turns 77 today. What's your favourite Lionel track?

angles.name: Still Dancing
angles.copy: Celebrating a legend! Happy Birthday to the incredible Lionel Richie, 77 today. Still dancing on the ceiling!

moments.title: Happy 81st Birthday Anne Murray
moments.blurb: Canadian country and pop singer Anne Murray, famous for 'Snowbird' and 'You Needed Me', celebrates her 81st birthday today.

angles.name: Celebrating a Canadian Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday to the wonderful Anne Murray today! Still sounding beautiful.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: From 'Snowbird' to 'You Needed Me', celebrating the lovely Anne Murray on her 81st birthday. What a voice!

angles.name: Happy Birthday
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to Canadian music icon Anne Murray, who turns 81 today. Still a timeless talent.

moments.title: Happy 41st Birthday Lana Del Rey
moments.blurb: Acclaimed American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her cinematic and melancholic pop, turns 41 tomorrow.

angles.name: Anticipating Celebration
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a Happy 41st Birthday to the unique and atmospheric Lana Del Rey!

angles.name: Iconic Catalogue
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Lana Del Rey turns 41 tomorrow. What's your favourite track from her iconic catalogue?

angles.name: Still Making Waves
angles.copy: Tomorrow's the day! Happy 41st Birthday to the one and only Lana Del Rey. Still making waves with her incredible music.

moments.title: Happy 82nd Birthday Ray Davies
moments.blurb: Ray Davies, the legendary frontman of The Kinks and influential songwriter, celebrates his 82nd birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Celebrating a Kinks Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a very Happy 82nd Birthday to the iconic Ray Davies of The Kinks!

angles.name: Songwriting Genius
angles.copy: From 'Waterloo Sunset' to 'Lola', celebrating the brilliant Ray Davies as he turns 82 tomorrow. What a legend!

angles.name: British Icon
angles.copy: Happy Birthday for tomorrow to the visionary Ray Davies, 82 years young. Still one of Britain's finest songwriters.

moments.title: Happy 73rd Birthday Cyndi Lauper
moments.blurb: Pop icon Cyndi Lauper, known for her vibrant style and hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', turns 73 on Monday.

angles.name: Still Shining

angles.name: Favourite Song

moments.title: Happy 81st Birthday Carly Simon

angles.name: You're So Vain

angles.name: Nobody Does It Better
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday to the iconic Carly Simon this Thursday. Still nobody does it better!

angles.name: Timeless Songs
